nasb.text: and said, “Where have you laid him?” They *said to Him, “Lord, come and see.”

esv.text: And he said, “Where have you laid him?” They said to him, “Lord, come and see.”

cnv.text: 說：“你們把他安放在哪裡？”他們說：“主啊，請來看。”

ccb.text: 便问：“你们把他葬在哪里了？” 他们答道：“主啊，你来看。”

csbs.text: 他问：“你们把他安放在哪里？” 他们回答说：“主啊，请来看。”
